MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-06-2018 IN 206, RESPONDENT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL AND OPEN DISCOVERY. APPELLANT JONATHAN MIKHALEVSHY APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. CHARLES MCCURDY, ESQ. APPEARING FOR RESPONDENT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT GRANTS RESPONDENT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 12/10/18 IS CONTINUED TO 4/8/19 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. DISCOVERY REMAINS OPEN. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
